# Pazbi Zavatzki

> Pazbi Zavatzki (often searched as "Pazbi" or "Panagiotis Zavatzki") is a keynote speaker, workshop leader and AI advisor. He helps leaders and their teams stay irreplaceable in an AI world — turning AI hype into systems, skills and revenue. Greek-born, London-based, with fifteen years in digital marketing and 300+ companies worked with. Founder of Kickass Online and Neuroinclusive Standards.

## About

- Signature method: **Map · Build · Scale** — map how a business runs today, build the fix (workshop, training, automation), then scale it through the team so growth holds.
- Signature keynote: **How to Be Irreplaceable in an AI World** (45–60 min, adaptable) — what AI changes, what it doesn't, and the moves that keep people and businesses at the centre.
- Topics he speaks and advises on: Artificial Intelligence, Generative AI, Digital Transformation, Business Automation, Business Strategy, and Neurodiversity in the workplace.
- Based in the United Kingdom; speaks internationally (has spoken in 6 countries).
- Press: quoted in Forbes ("The Surprising Things People Quit For Better Productivity", April 2025) and featured in the Forbes Legacy Pass collector's issue (Dec 2024/Jan 2025); BBC Ouch, BBC Radio and The One Show covered BSL Slam, which he founded; interviewed on Hellenic TV.
- Contact / booking: hello@thepazbi.com

## Key pages

- [Home](https://thepazbi.com/): Overview, the Map · Build · Scale method, and signature keynote.
- [Speaking](https://thepazbi.com/speaking): Keynotes and talks available for booking.
- [Workshops](https://thepazbi.com/workshops): Hands-on AI and automation workshops for teams.
- [Consultancy](https://thepazbi.com/consultancy): AI and digital transformation advisory.
- [Work with Pazbi](https://thepazbi.com/scale): Apply for a free 30-minute AI Opportunity Call — a working session that maps your highest-leverage AI automations.
- [The Irreplaceable Scorecard](https://thepazbi.com/scorecard): Free 10-minute self-test — score any workflow and learn whether to automate it, augment it, or leave it alone.
- [Getting Started with Claude for Your Business](https://thepazbi.com/workshop): One-day live online workshop (Saturday 1 August 2026, £100 + VAT) — leave with Claude set up for your business.
- [About](https://thepazbi.com/about): Full biography and story.
- [Events](https://thepazbi.com/events): Upcoming and past appearances.
- [Media](https://thepazbi.com/media): Podcasts, interviews, talks, TV and awards.
- [Writing](https://thepazbi.com/writing): Articles on AI, automation and business.
- [Contact](https://thepazbi.com/contact): Booking and enquiries.
- [For AI agents](https://thepazbi.com/ai): A structured profile written for AI assistants.
